mapper.insert: insert into users values(#{id}, #{pw}, users_seq.nextval, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{oriname}, #{ssn_hash}, #{ssn_enc}, #{ssn_masked}, #{zonecode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', TO_TIMESTAMP(#{hire_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), null, #{dept_seq}, #{rank_seq}, sysdate, null, #{sysname}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.rank_name from users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN "RANK" r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq WHERE u.id = #{id}

select u.id as id, u.users_seq as users_seq, u.name as name, u.ssn_masked as ssn_masked, u.rank_seq as rank_seq, u.address1 as address1, u.address2 as address2, u.hire_date as hire_date, u.sysname as sysname,
d.dept_seq as dept_seq, d.dept_name as dept_name, d.parent_dept_seq as parent_dept_seq, d.auth_group as auth_group,
r.rank_name rank_name, u.role as role, al.remaining_days as remaining_days, st.sysname as stamp_sysname,
( select listagg(ur.auth_group, ',') within group(order by ur.auth_group) from users_role ur where ur.users_id = u.id )as user_auth_group
from users u left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join annual_leave al on u.id = al.users_id left join user_stamp st on u.id = st.users_id where id = #{loginId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, update_at = sysdate, resign_date = sysdate null
WHERE users_seq = #{users_seq}

update users set name = #{name}, dept_seq = NVL(#{dept_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, dept_seq), rank_seq = NVL(#{rank_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, rank_seq), role = NVL(#{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, role), is_hr_manager = NVL(#{is_hr_manager, jdbcType=CHAR}, is_hr_manager), update_at = sysdate where users_seq = #{users_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.users_seq, u.name, u.role, u.created_at, u.update_at, u.sysname, u.is_hr_manager, d.dept_seq AS dept_seq, d.dept_name AS dept_name, d.parent_dept_seq AS parent_dept_seq, d.auth_group AS auth_group, r.rank_name AS rank_name, r.rank_seq AS rank_seq, r.rank_order AS rank_order FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN rank r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.rank_order

SELECT u.users_seq, u.name, u.id, u.phone, u.email, u.sysname, u.oriname, u.zonecode, u.address1, u.address2, u.hire_date, d.dept_seq, d.dept_name, r.rank_seq, r.rank_name, s.sysname AS stamp_sysname, s.oriname AS stamp_oriname, s.stamp_seq FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN rank r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq LEFT JOIN user_stamp s ON u.id = s.users_id WHERE u.id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_stamp (stamp_seq, users_id, sysname, oriname, created_at) VALUES (STAMP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{sysname}, #{oriname}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_stamp SET sysname = #{sysname}, oriname = #{oriname}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE users_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_stamp WHERE users_id = #{id}
select count(*) from users where name = #{name} and email = #{email}
select count(*) from users where id = #{id} and name = #{name} and email = #{email}
select id from users where email = #{email}
mapper.update: update users set pw = #{pw} where email = #{email}
mapper.select: select rank_seq from users where id = #{loginId}
select sysname from user_stamp where users_id = #{users_id}
select sysname from users where id = #{users_id}
mapper.update: update users set sysname = #{sysname}, oriname = #{oriname} where id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: insert into users ( id, pw, users_seq, name, phone, email, oriname, ssn_hash, ssn_enc, ssn_masked, zonecode, address1, address2, role, status, hire_date, dept_seq, rank_seq, created_at, sysname, is_hr_manager ) values ( #{id}, #{pw}, users_seq.nextval, #{name}, '-', #{email}, 'Default6.png', '-', '-', '-', '-', '-', '-', 'USER', 'ACTIVE', TO_TIMESTAMP(#{hire_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{dept_seq}, #{rank_seq}, sysdate, 'Default6.png', 'N' )
